description_long: This modern bungalow features a single-story layout with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior is clad in dark gray panels with large white-framed windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. A carport is integrated into the structure, adjacent to a driveway and a small green lawn. The rear of the bungalow opens to a spacious patio area with outdoor seating, a large umbrella, and a dining table, ideal for entertaining. The property is landscaped with a few trees and shrubs, enhancing its suburban appeal. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and clean architectural lines.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, dark gray exterior, large windows, carport, and a spacious rear patio with outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport with a parked car, and a small lawn with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, and the solid dark gray facade with minimal windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large patio area with outdoor furniture, umbrella, and open access to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back lawn, patio, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
